# tplinkeasysmart_igmp_snooping (Resource)

Manage the switch-wide IGMP snooping settings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tplinkeasysmart_igmp_snooping" "switch" {
  enabled                    = true
  report_message_suppression = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether IGMP snooping is enabled on the switch.
- `report_message_suppression` (Boolean) Whether IGMP report message suppression is enabled.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier for the singleton IGMP snooping object.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = tplinkeasysmart_igmp_snooping.switch
  id = "igmp_snooping"
}

resource "tplinkeasysmart_igmp_snooping" "switch" {
  enabled                    = true
  report_message_suppression = false
}
```
